Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestPredicateVariables

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestPredicateVariables
public class TestPredicateVariables extends AbstractTests
Ensures that the set of predicate variables occurring in a formula is computed correctly.
